ab: Tuba, min’aura iaku kminathu sa patatash, shduu ihu shimulikuan?
ch: W:Tuba，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Tuba, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: uka iaku mani, ti Shuni izai.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Shuni’s.

ab: shduu ya shimulikuan? muhiaw iaku pushuqishin uhu.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: ua, arahu.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: anuniza, anuniza Shuni mani.
en: Thank you and thank Shuni for me.

ab: numa sa amindahipuan uhu?
en: May I help you?

ab: apushuqishin iaku sa izai a latusha wa patashan.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: ua, itiawan amindahipuan uhu?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: amuqthawan iaku shmimul laturu a patashan.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: shduuiza, ata tu in’auraan ya turuiza wa qali apushuqishin.
ch: A:好了，記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: niwan ihu tu pushuqishin iakin tatitish.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: pinushuqishiza iaku ihun tilha.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: minuiza naak a tatitish makauka.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: qazii ihu ya pashimul Tuba?
en: Did you lend it to Tuba?

ab: tihawta iaku, pakikalhiwan iaku thithu.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: mihala iaku shimulin naak a tatitish ihun.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Shuni, izai a maka’apaw a hulus sa Tuba wa shimulin uhu?
en: Shuni, did Tuba lend you this coat?

ab: ani, haya naak a ina finariw lhai iakin.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: Tuba wa maka’apaw a hulus tataal mihu.
en: Tuba’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: thithu a maka’apaw a hulus maqusuqusum, antu tataal iamin.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們顏色不一樣。
en: ’s coat is thHis coat is black, so our colors are different.e same as yours.

ab: Shuni, shinimul ihu sa Hudun a tuali?
en: Shuni, did you borrow money from Hudun?

ab: ua, naur thuini iaku mriri thithu, min’aura iaku makathu sa tuali.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: alhakaiza ya pushuqishin uhu?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: pushuqishin iaku thithu ya simaq.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: ua, afuilh iaku Hudun.
en: Okay, I will tell Hudun for you.
